reasoning: Inspected at 4x and 8x zoom. The pixel art gem is generally clean with hard pixel edges appropriate for the style. No sub-pixel features or AA bleed on the outer silhouette. The beige/cream outline is consistent 1px width throughout. However: (1) The internal facet highlight pattern shows left-right asymmetry — the dark oval center motif and surrounding bright facet pixels are not mirror-symmetric as a hand-crafted gem would be. (2) The green palette uses more distinct values than a strict manual pixel artist would choose — subtle gradient-like progression in the facet tones rather than a tight 3-tone hard palette. (3) At the boundary between the green facets and the beige base, 1-2 pixels show color bleed suggesting imprecise edge generation. Background is clean and solid, no noise pixels detected. Overall shape reads correctly as an emerald gem. Issues are minor enough to be borderline pass but the asymmetry and palette looseness are characteristic AI tells.
